segments.text: God stands in the congregation of the mighty; He judges among the gods.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: How long will you judge unjustly, And show partiality to the wicked?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Defend the poor and fatherless; Do justice to the afflicted and needy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Deliver the poor and needy; Free them from the hand of the wicked.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They do not know, nor do they understand; They walk about in darkness; All the foundations of the earth are unstable.
You are gods, And all of you are children of the Most High.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But you shall die like men, And fall like one of the princes.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Arise, O God, judge the earth; For You shall inherit all nations.
segments.speaker: David
